zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley於大約1476年出生在英國肯特澤亞爾時，她的父親Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth27歲，母親Lady Margaret Frazier31歲。她於大約1497年與Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley在英國英格蘭肯特澤亞爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1546年在她的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國肯特澤亞爾 哈特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley于大约1476年出生在英国肯特澤亞爾时，她的父亲Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth27岁，母亲Lady Margaret Frazier31岁。她于大约1497年与Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley在英国英格兰肯特澤亞爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1546年在她的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国肯特澤亞爾 哈特。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Silvestra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley was born about 1476, in Seal, Kent, England, her father, Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth, was 27 and her mother, Lady Margaret Frazier, was 31. She married Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley about 1497, in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1546, in her hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Seal Chart, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley est née environ 1476, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Frazier, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley environ 1497, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1546, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Seal Chart, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley um 1476 in Seal, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Frazier 31. Sie hat um 1497 in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1546 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Seal Chart, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley è nata il circa 1476 nel Seal, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Frazier, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley circa 1497, nel Seal, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1546, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Seal Chart, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepleyが約1476年にイギリスケントセアルで生まれた時，父Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworthは27歳，母Lady Margaret Frazierは31歳であった。約1497年にイギリスイギリスケントセアルでSir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1546年に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスケントセアル チャートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley(이)가 대략 1476년 영국 켄트 시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Frazier(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 시에서 Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1546년 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 시 처트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley nasceu aproximadamente 1476, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Frazier, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley aproximadamente 1497, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1546, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Seal Chart, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley родилась около 1476 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Frazier, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley около 1497 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1546 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности силь чарт, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley nació aproximadamente 1476, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Frazier, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley aproximadamente 1497, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1546, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Seal Chart, Kent, Inglaterra.
